title: All-Seer/Grey Robed All Seer
content:
The    Grey-robed All-Seer    is one of the avatar s 
Wang Lin
 meets when he is given the opportunity to choose a skill from the All-Seer s arsenal. He was thought to represent All-Seer s slaughter dao, but was actually All-Seer s original personality as well. He bestows Wang Lin the method to gather slaughter energy which becomes one of his greatest trump cards.

Background
[
]

A long time ago, the Grey-robed All-Seer was actually the main personality of the current All-Seer. He was very talented and was a steadily rising member in the Cultivation Alliance. However, his talent attracted Master Zhong Xuan who feared that his talent might endanger his position and ambushed him.

This led to his Dao Heart becoming heavily damaged, which caused the rainbow-colored All-Seer to assume over his body.

As the grey-robed All-Seer, he had a positive relationship with Ling Tianhou, unlike the rainbow persona. However, this was all a ruse as he planned to devour him for his 98th awakening as the Heavenly Dao from the very beginning.

History
[
]

The Grey-Robed All-Seer is a mysterious and formidable manifestation of the All-Seer, one of the most enigmatic figures within the Heavenly Fate Sect. Recognized by his distinct grey robe nd overwhelming killing intent, he represents one of the  3,000 to 3,600 avatars or incarnations of the All-Seer each cultivating unique spells, powers, and aspects of their shared essence. Among these countless avatars, the Grey-Robed All-Seer stands out as the embodiment of    slaughter, darkness, and forbidden power   .

He is known for his mastery of the Celestial Slaughter Art, a forbidden and devastating spell that allows him to    convert killing energy into life force , enhancing his defenses and near-immortality. Through this art, he has accumulated millions of life seals, making him nearly invincible even in the face of catastrophic destruction. His very presence exudes a chilling aura of death, capable of suppressing even other All-Seers, who must often seal themselves away or retreat from his overwhelming killing intent.

The Grey-Robed All-Seer possesses a cold, detached, and ruthless personality. When he appears before Wang Lin, he demands that Wang Lin display his domain and offers to teach him the Celestial Slaughter Art. Upon Wang Lin’s refusal, the Grey-Robed All-Seer demonstrates his terrifying power by killing another All-Seer from afar, using the spell’s life seals to obliterate his target without direct confrontation. This encounter reveals both his disdainful temperament    and his role as a tester or gatekeeper of forbidden knowledge, one who measures others’ worth through trials of life and death.

In battle, the Grey-Robed All-Seer acts independently of the other avatars, exhibiting a solitary and ferocious demeanor. He wields a black sword forged from pure darkness, capable of absorbing all surrounding light an extension of his nature as a being of slaughter and shadow. His power commands fear and respect, even from figures as renowned as    Sword Saint Ling Tianhou . In several major confrontations, his mere arrival shifts the balance of battle, his killing intent blanketing entire regions.

Later it is revealed that this grey-robed incarnation is 
most primal aspects of the All-Seer
. His original
